zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel d' Etton於大約1280年出生在英國素瑞迪千時，她的父親Gilbert de Eton31歲，母親Alice de Tichesey28歲。她和John De Uvedale II至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1347年11月16日享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel d' Etton于大约1280年出生在英国素瑞迪千时，她的父亲Gilbert de Eton31岁，母亲Alice de Tichesey28岁。她和John De Uvedale II至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1347年11月16日享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Etton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Norman French Otton, oblique case of the common ancient Germanic personal name Otto .

variants.name: Otto
meanings: German, Danish, Swedish, and Dutch; Hungarian (Ottó): from the personal name Otto, a short form of ancient Germanic compound names based on the element aud, ōd ‘wealth, prosperity’ (see also Ott ). The name Otto was a hereditary name in the Saxon ruling house, as well as being borne by Otto von Wittelsbach, who founded the Bavarian ruling dynasty in the 11th century, and the 12th-century Saint Otto of Bamberg, apostle of Pomerania.

History: This name was introduced to America by Bodo Otto, a senior surgeon of the Continental Army, who was born in Hanover, Germany, in 1711, came to North America in 1755, and practiced in NJ and PA. He died in Reading, PA, in 1787.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel d' Etton was born about 1280, in Titsey, Surrey, England, her father, Gilbert de Eton, was 31 and her mother, Alice de Tichesey, was 28. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with John De Uvedale II. She died on 16 November 1347, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel d' Etton est née environ 1280, à Titsey, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert d’Eton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice de Tichesey, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec John De Uvedale II. Elle est décédée le 16 novembre 1347, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel d' Etton um 1280 in Titsey, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert de Eton 31 und ihre Mutter Alice de Tichesey 28. Sie hatte mit John De Uvedale II mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. November 1347 im Alter von 68 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel d' Etton è nata il circa 1280 nel Titsey, Surrey, England, sua padre, Gilbert de Eton, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alice de Tichesey, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con John De Uvedale II. Morì il 16 novembre 1347, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel d' Ettonが約1280年にイギリススリーティトセイで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Etonは31歳，母Alice de Ticheseyは28歳であった。彼女はJohn De Uvedale IIとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1347年11月16日に68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel d' Etton(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 수리 티츠이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert de Eton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Tichesey(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 John De Uvedale II(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1347년 11월 16일 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel d' Etton родилась около 1280 г. в местности тици, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Gilbert de Eton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Tichesey, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от John De Uvedale II. Она умерла 16 ноября 1347 г. в возрасте 68 лет.
